description_long: This object consists of three adjacent, two-story commercial buildings, with the central one being a pastel pink pastry shop. The pink shop features a prominent bay window and a single door, with white decorative brickwork scattered across its facade. The neighboring buildings are painted in soft yellow and blue, each with their own distinct window and door arrangements; the blue building has a large awning over its ground-floor windows, while the yellow building has an open door and large windows. The roofs are flat and simple, with minimal ornamentation. The overall appearance is clean and stylized, with smooth surfaces and pastel colors. The shopfronts evoke a quaint, small-town or European urban street aesthetic.
description: A pastel pink pastry shop flanked by yellow and blue commercial buildings, featuring a bay window, decorative brickwork, and a clean, stylized facade.
description_view_0: The front view shows all three buildings, with the pink pastry shop in the center, a bay window, a single door, and decorative white brickwork; the yellow building has an open door, and the blue building features a large awning.
description_view_1: The right-side view reveals the depth of the buildings, with the blue building in the foreground and the awning visible, but minimal facade detail.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain backs of the three buildings, with no windows, doors, or decorative elements visible.
description_view_3: The left-side view shows the yellow building in the foreground, with the side walls of all three buildings visible and no significant architectural features.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with simplified, stylized facades and minimal ornamentation, evoking a quaint small-town or European urban street aesthetic.
